expected_behavior: The smallest compatible adapter path preserves existing artifacts/evidence/claims/ontology/audit; rollback is deterministic; no destructive migration runs without approval.
given: VS2 database/policy/runtime changes are deployed over the existing local scaffold and VS1 data.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Before/after object counts/hashes, regression reports, rollback transcript, no data loss.
then: The smallest compatible adapter path preserves existing artifacts/evidence/claims/ontology/audit; rollback is deterministic; no destructive migration runs without approval.
verification_method: Fresh and upgrade-path integration tests with checksums and existing VS0/VS1 fixtures.
when: Forward migration, compatibility run, failed migration, and rollback are exercised.
